options.name: -cell_view
options.description: Specifies the library name, cell name, and view name in the OpenAccess database format

options.name: -dir
options.description: Stores the ILM data in the specified directory: the absolute directory path or the path relative to the current directory

options.name: -incr
options.description: Let you add files in addition to the existing files to the directory

options.name: -model_type
options.description: Decide the type of ILM model

options.name: -overwrite
options.description: Overwrites existing files in the directory

options.name: -rc_corner
options.description: Specifies the RC corner name for MMMC analysis. The -rc_corner parameter identifies the specified corner to be used with -spef

options.name: -sdc
options.description: Specifies an existing .sdc file that you want to include in the directory. The -sdc parameter identifies the sdc file to be used with the specified view

options.name: -spef
options.description: Specifies an existing .spef file that you want to include in the directory. The -spef parameter identifies the spef file to be used with the specified corner

options.name: -timing_view
options.description: Specifies the view name for the ILM module. The -timing_view parameter identifies the specified view to be used with -sdc

options.name: -uniquify_netlist
options.description: Uniquifies the input Verilog netlist. This ensures that there are no errors when ILMs are being loaded

options.name: -verilog
options.description: Specifies the verilog file you want to include in the ILM data directory

options.name: -xtwf
options.description: Specifies the .xtwf file that you want to include in the directory
